Package org.mitre.synthea.editors

Class GrowthDataErrorsEditor

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.editors.GrowthDataErrorsEditor
All Implemented Interfaces:
HealthRecordEditor
public class GrowthDataErrorsEditor extends Object implements HealthRecordEditor
This editor simulates errors that occur in growth data as it would be collected in a clinical setting. This editor is an implementation of the protocol for simulating growth data errors as specified in Supplemental File 5 in the paper "Automated identification of implausible values in growth data from pediatric electronic health records": https://academic.oup.com/jamia/article/24/6/1080/3767271

If a height or weight is changed, if the Encounter has an associated BMI, it will be recomputed based on the new, error values.

This module will only operate on Observations that take place while the patient is less than MAX_AGE.

    class

    Configuration class for specifying error rates in growth data editing.

    static final String
    BMI_LOINC_CODE
    LOINC code for BMI observations.

    LOINC code for height observations.
    double
    heightAbsoluteErrorRate
    Probability rate of introducing absolute errors in height measurements.
    double
    heightCarriedForwardErrorRate
    Probability rate of carrying forward previous height measurements erroneously.
    double
    heightDuplicateErrorRate
    Probability rate of duplicating height measurements.
    double
    heightExtremeErrorRate
    Probability rate of introducing extreme (outlier) errors in height measurements.
    double
    heightSwitchErrorRate
    Probability rate of switching height values between different records.
    double
    heightTransposeErrorRate
    Probability rate of introducing digit transposition errors in height measurements.
    double
    heightUnitErrorRate
    Probability rate of introducing unit errors in height measurements.

    Conversion factor from centimeters to inches.

    double

    weightUnitErrorRate

    Replace the height observation in this encounter with the value from the person's last encounter.

  • Constructor Details

    • GrowthDataErrorsEditor

      public GrowthDataErrorsEditor()
      Empty constructor

  • Method Details

    • shouldRun

      public boolean shouldRun(Person person, HealthRecord record, long time)
      Checks to see if the person is under MAX_AGE.
      Specified by:
      shouldRun in interface HealthRecordEditor
      Parameters:
      person - The Synthea person to check on whether the module should be run.
      record - The person's HealthRecord.
      time - The current time in the simulation.
      Returns:
      True if the person is under MAX_AGE.

    • process

      public void process(Person person, List<HealthRecord.Encounter> encounters, long time)
      Potentially mess up heights and weights in the encounters.
      Specified by:
      process in interface HealthRecordEditor
      Parameters:
      person - The Synthea person to check on whether the module should be run.
      encounters - The encounters that took place during the last time step of the simulation.
      time - The current time in the simulation.

    • introduceWeightUnitError

      public static void introduceWeightUnitError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Convert the weight observation value from kg to lbs. The unit is not updated because we are intentionally messing things up.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • introduceHeightUnitError

      public static void introduceHeightUnitError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Convert the height observation from cm to in. Again, we're intentionally messing things up here.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • introduceTransposeError

      public static void introduceTransposeError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter, String obsType)
      Flip the tens and ones place in the desired observation value.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.
      obsType - "height" or "weight".

    • introduceWeightSwitchError

      public static void introduceWeightSwitchError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Swap weight and height. This will work even if height is null. It will set weight to null and height to the weight value.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • introduceHeightSwitchError

      public static void introduceHeightSwitchError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Swap height and weight. This will work even if weight is null. It will set height to null and weight to height.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • introduceWeightExtremeError

      public static void introduceWeightExtremeError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Shift the decimal place for the weight observation one place to the right.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • introduceHeightExtremeError

      public static void introduceHeightExtremeError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Shift the decimal place for the height observation one place to the right.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • introduceHeightAbsoluteError

      public static void introduceHeightAbsoluteError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter, RandomNumberGenerator random)
      Reduce the height observation by 3 to 6 cm. It looks like someone forgot to take off their shoes before getting measured.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.
      random - The random number generator to use.

    • introduceWeightDuplicateError

      public static void introduceWeightDuplicateError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter, RandomNumberGenerator random)
      Create a duplicate weight observation in the encounter that is off slightly.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.
      random - The random number generator to use.

    • introduceHeightDuplicateError

      public static void introduceHeightDuplicateError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter, RandomNumberGenerator random)
      Create a duplicate height observation in the encounter that is off slightly.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.
      random - The random number generator to use.

    • introduceWeightCarriedForwardError

      public static void introduceWeightCarriedForwardError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Replace the weight observation in this encounter with the value from the person's last encounter.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • introduceHeightCarriedForwardError

      public static void introduceHeightCarriedForwardError(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Replace the height observation in this encounter with the value from the person's last encounter.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter that contains the observation.

    • recalculateBMI

      public static void recalculateBMI(HealthRecord.Encounter encounter)
      Recalculate the BMI based on the existing height and weight observations in the encounter. Only recreates a BMI if one already exists. Otherwise, it does nothing.
      Parameters:
      encounter - The encounter to recalculate BMI on.

    • encountersWithObservationsOfCode

      public List<HealthRecord.Encounter> encountersWithObservationsOfCode(List<HealthRecord.Encounter> encounters, String code)
      Filter a list of encounters to find all that have an observation with a particular code.
      Parameters:
      encounters - The list to filter.
      code - The code to look for.
      Returns:
      The filtered list. If there are no matching encounters, then an empty list.
